reason: Check scheduled-loop timing, trusted-date selection, terminal semantics, and no retry or threshold bypass.
Check immutable run identity, coverage metadata, generation reuse, and deterministic membership.
Check cohort uniqueness and distinguish expected pending horizons from defects.
Check citation integrity, at-most-once model use, redaction, and research-only response boundaries.
Check all 95/90/80 gates without threshold relaxation.
Apply non-mutating diagnostics and proportional validation for evidence-only work or any focused fix.
Verify probes and conclusions against the audited runtime behavior and risks.
